title: Son of Sardaar
subTitle: Jaswinder returns to his hometown to sell a piece of land he owns and falls in love with a young woman only to find out later that her family wants him dead.

title: Made in China
subTitle: Raghuveer Mehta, a failing businessman, travels to China for some work. During the trip, he hatches a plan to sell an aphrodisiac that enhances men's sexual health in India.

title: Jayeshbhai Jordaar
subTitle: Jayesh believes in equal rights for women despite living with a deeply patriarchal family. When he learns his second child will be female, he makes a plan to protect his wife from his family.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: India's Most Wanted
subTitle: As a nod to the proverb fortune favours the brave, a ragtag team of heroes takes it upon themselves to apprehend one of India's most dreaded enemies.

title: A Wednesday!
subTitle: Prakash Rathod, a retired police commissioner, recounts the most memorable case of his career wherein he was informed about a bomb scare in Mumbai by an ordinary commoner.

title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
subTitle: Milkha Singh, an Indian athlete, overcomes many agonising obstacles in order to become a world champion, Olympian and one of India's most iconic athletes.

title: The Warriorr
subTitle: Satya, a doctor, is brutally beaten and driven out of his city by Guru, a ruthless gangster. However, Satya returns two years later as a police officer to exact revenge on Guru.

title: Hanu Man
subTitle: A local thief, who lives in the village of Anjanadri, comes across a Hanuman-like power. He must protect people from the peril that looms over them.

title: Soldier
subTitle: After Major Vijay Malhotra's colleagues betray him, he is branded as a traitor and subsequently killed. But his son, Vicky, vows to take revenge on his father's murderers and prove his innocence.

title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa
subTitle: Aditya Shrivastav, a psychologist, is called to investigate a palace haunted by a ghost. As he looks into the strange occurrences, he discovers the truth behind them.

title: Vivegam
subTitle: Ajay Kumar, a former counter-terrorism agent, is called for a special mission. However, he is betrayed by his friends and is accused of extremely treasonous acts.

title: Vivegam
subTitle: Ajay Kumar, a former counter-terrorism agent, is called for a special mission. However, he is betrayed by his friends and is accused of extremely treasonous acts.

title: Hum
subTitle: A man is determined to kill a cruel businessman to get revenge for his father's death but is stopped by an inspector who is the mastermind behind the troubles.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Jawani Diwani: A Youthful Joyride
subTitle: An aspiring singer woos the daughter of the managing director of a recording company to secure a deal. Things turn nasty when he falls for another girl and is torn between commitment and love.

title: L7
subTitle: Arun and Sandhya, a newly married couple, move into a new home to begin their marital life. However, Arun soon realises that his wife is possessed, and he must do whatever it takes to save her.

title: Ab Ke Baras
subTitle: Anjali comes to India to investigate recurring visions of her past life in her dreams. Later, she meets a thief who might have been her lover in another lifetime.

title: Dhruva
subTitle: A committed police officer, Dhruva, uncovers a web of organised crime headed by a scientist, Siddharth Abhimanyu. But when Dhruva tries to build a case against him, he faces many challenges.

title: Bhoothnath
subTitle: When a mischievous ghost returns to his ancestral home, chaos unfolds with both humor and heart as he tries to protect his family and teach valuable lessons to the living.

title: Bhagavanth Kesari
subTitle: A former prisoner is adamant about training his adoptive daughter to join the Indian Army. However, his mission is interrupted by a conflict with a ruthless businessman.

title: Fidaa
subTitle: An NRI medical student falls in love with a vivacious woman. However, they face challenges in their relationship due to their differences in personalities.

title: War 2
subTitle: Things get complicated when Kabir Dhaliwal, a secret agent, is accused of betraying his nation and his former batchmate shoulders the responsibility of finding him.

title: MCA: Middle Class Abbayi
subTitle: Nani, a middle-class boy with an eidetic memory, helps save his sister-in-law from a goon. Meanwhile, he also tries to convince his girlfriend's father to marry her off to him.

title: MCA: Middle Class Abbayi
subTitle: Nani, a middle-class boy with an eidetic memory, helps save his sister-in-law from a goon. Meanwhile, he also tries to convince his girlfriend's father to marry her off to him.

title: Krishna Aur Kans
subTitle: With his quick wit and valiant strength, Krishna outsmarts and defeats his evil uncle, King Kans, and the legion of demons he unleashes.

title: Om Shanti
subTitle: When a terror outfit plans to target Hyderabad with a series of bomb blasts, five individuals from different walks of life come together to save the people.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Bengaluru Underworld
subTitle: Maalik, who aspires to rule Bengaluru, becomes the right-hand man of the city's biggest gangster. Subsequently, he fights to reach the top using his quick wit and shrewdness.

title: Mere Yaar Ki Shaadi Hai
subTitle: Childhood friends Sanjay and Anjali do not realise their feelings for each other until Anjali gets engaged to Rohit. Sanjay arrives to help with the preparations, but has another plan up his sleeve.

title: Heropanti
subTitle: When Renu elopes with her lover, her father, Chowdhary, kidnaps Bablu and his friends, who know Renu's whereabouts. However, Bablu unintentionally falls for Dimpy, Chowdhary's younger daughter.

title: Vijay The Master
subTitle: Troubled alcoholic teacher JD goes to work at a juvenile reform school. When he realises a dangerous criminal is using students to cover up his crimes, JD sets out to stop him.

title: Dangal
subTitle: Mahavir Singh Phogat, a former wrestling champion, dedicates himself to transforming his daughters, Geeta and Babita, into elite wrestlers.

title: Housefull 3
subTitle: A rich businessman does not want his three daughters to get married because of a superstitious belief. Now, their boyfriends must prove to him that they are perfect for his daughters.

title: Kuberaa
subTitle: Following a tycoon's discovery of a rare oil reserve, a compassionate beggar gets trapped in the dangerous mechanisms of his rapacious scheme.

title: Atithi Tum Kab Jaoge
subTitle: Mumbai-based couple Puneet and Munmun's lives are turned upside down when a distant relative arrives at their doorstep and starts meddling in their personal and professional affairs.
